briefs.title: BC creates new power supply rules for AI data centres and hydrogen production facilities
briefs.summary: BC's new regulation sets out how AI data centres, conventional data centres, and hydrogen-for-export facilities can apply for electricity supply from BC Hydro, including a competitive process and design deposit requirements.
briefs.action_required: If you operate or plan to build a data centre or hydrogen facility in BC, review the new power supply application rules now.

key_dates.label: BC Data Centre & Hydrogen Facility Power Supply Regulation takes effect
